new_javadoc:
/** * Unregisters the given object pair. * *

* Used by the reflection methods to avoid infinite loops. *

* * @param lhs {@code this} object to unregister * @param rhs the other object to unregister */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/CompareToBuilder.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/CompareToBuilder.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/CompareToBuilder.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/CompareToBuilder.java @@ -0,0 +394,16 @@ + register(lhs, rhs, getRegistry()); + } + + /** + * Unregisters the given object pair. + * + *

+ * Used by the reflection methods to avoid infinite loops. + *

+ * + * @param lhs {@code this} object to unregister + * @param rhs the other object to unregister + */ + private static void unregister(final Object lhs, final Object rhs) { + unregister(lhs, rhs, getRegistry(), REGISTRY); + }
commit_message: CompareToBuilder lacks cycle guard on Object[] recursion. (#1669)
